title: DAF Modernization Process Model
text:
The SAF/AQXP SCM Team has updated the DAF Modernization Process Model to version 16.0. This version introduces a ChatBot on the landing pages of the model. The ChatBot is programmed with information on all the processes in the MPM. Users are able to ask it questions on How a process works, Who is the owner or performer of a process, What a process is, or Where a process is found in the MPM. Should you have any questions, comments, or concerns about the MPM or the ChatBot on the landing pages, please reach out to us using the Contact Us page.
Continue Reading
The CPI Team of SAF/AQXP updated the DAF Acquisition Process Model to version 14.6. This version updates several of the AFLCMC Standard Process Documents and adds a new feature to the landing pages. For a complete list of changes, refer to the Document Changes page where you can now find the new feature of a link to the document that’s been changed. These links will only be available for the most recent major release of the APM. If you have any recommendations, questions, or concerns, please contact the CPI Team through our Contact Us page.
Continue Reading
The Acquisition Process Model has been upgraded to version 13.4. This new version includes the addition of DoDI 4120.11 Mobile Electric Power Systems, new section of the AFFARS and FAR, and an updated DAFI 65-301 Internal Audit Services. It removed AF/A5R Requirements Development Guidebook Vol. 4 and replaced it with AF/A5/7 Capability Development Guidebook Volume 2H. For more information on all the documents added, updated, or removed please check out the Document Changes page. In addition to document changes, the landing pages have a new format for Reference Documents. The documents are presented into categories such as Pathway, Topic, and Hierarchy. Each main category is broken into sub-categories. You can… Read More
Continue Reading
It was brought to our attention that the search icon, formally in the top menu, was not working on GFE laptops. We have moved the search bar to the right side of the screen and verified that this works on GFE laptops now.
Continue Reading
The Acquisition Process Model has updated the landing pages. The format has been redesigned to be more user friendly including features like a menu that is always available. Feedback about the new landing page is welcome using the “Contact Us” page.
